voiceChannelRequired: Connect to a voice channel before using this command.
insufficientPlayers: At least two players are required to create balanced teams.
invalidTeamCount: Choose a whole number of teams between **{{min}}** and **{{max}}**.
insufficientPlayersForTeamCount: At least **{{teamCount}}** players are required to create **{{teamCount}}** teams. Only **{{playerCount}}** eligible players were found.
unauthorizedInteraction: Only the user who started this interaction can complete it.
guildOnlyInteraction: This interaction can only be used inside a server.
invalidCommand: That command was not recognized. Use `!help` to see the available options.
missingLobbyChannel: No lobby voice channel was found.
noPlayersToRegroup: There are no players to move back to the lobby.
noConnectedUsers: No connected users were found in voice channels.
moveFailed: The move could not be completed.
missingTeamChannels: The team voice channels could not be found.
missingTeamChannelId: No destination voice channel ID is configured for **{{teamName}}** ({{teamId}}).
invalidTeamChannelId: The configured channel for **{{teamName}}** could not be found or is not a voice channel.
missingMovePermissions: The bot does not have permission to move members into **{{channel}}**.
swapRequiresTwoTeams: `!swap` is currently available only for two-team matches.
sortHistoryLimitReached: No additional sort results can be stored right now.
